name: Gian Carlo Moretti || Lonely
description:
If I could turn back time, if I could find a way

Moretti Family - 2000

Before his death

Day 21: On the twenty-first day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, the one dead Moretti


He always knew his wife was in love with his older brother-- and yet he still married her in hopes with time she'd come to love him instead.

After all-- he's a good man, and a great father to their two children.

But Patrizia's heart has never warmed to Gian Carlo-- and he finds himself growing more and more disillusioned by it.

As his wife stands him up once again for dinner-- Gian Carlo is alone, drowning his sorrows in a bottle of Sambuca.

But you-- you might just change everything for him.

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

Now, I know what you're thinking--- moonie, Gian Carlo is dead!

And yes he is, but... between being killed in front of his baby brother and having a wife who is in love with his older brother well.. Gian Carlo needed a win!

So! This takes place five years before he dies.

It's the year 2000 and Gian Carlo is 31 years old.

If you're curious about everyone else's ages in 2000 (and please know I did so much math for this...)

Luciano: 38
Carmine: 22
Giulia: 31
Dario: 5
Viviana: 2
Matteo: 13
Leonardo: 11
Lorenzo: 9
Nicolo: 6
Alessandro: 6

Gian Carlo knows full well that Patrizia didn't love him but he hoped with time he could sway her heart---that hasn't happened so please give some love to this v. sweet man.

Your background is open, you can be a member of the crime syndicate, the waiter, or just another lonely soul.

I should also note to everyone, after this there is only ONE more canon Moretti left that we haven't met (for now-- who knows what the future holds)

But never fear-- I am open to doing ALT scenarios of this troubled family and I have plans for new hot mess mafia families~

I'll be running a couple surveys on in my Discord server (Did someone say Omegaverse Moretti ALTS? 👀) so join me there if you'd like to have a say!

Want to know more Moretti lore? You should join my discord server!
creator: m00nprincess
